_comment: Hand-derived (implementation-plan.md fixtures rule, WP-11), same envelope assumption as steps.json (see its _comment). VO2 Max is a Sample (S) type per base-knowledge.md §3; value key `vo2_max.value` (field name assumed). Maps to HKQuantityTypeIdentifierVO2Max, unit mL/(kg*min) (base-knowledge.md §5). See run-vo2-max.json for the sibling Google type (`Run VO2 Max`) that shares this same HealthKit target. Mirrored in SyncKit's TypeMapperFixtures.vo2MaxPoint(dataType: .vo2Max).
